questions.q: Scientists have recently engineered which plant to produce five powerful psychedelic compounds found in other organisms?
questions.correctText: Scientists have engineered tobacco plants to produce five powerful psychedelic compounds.

questions.q: What federal effort was recently struck down by a judge, aiming to protect critical habitats for endangered species?
options: Effort to weaken the Clean Water Act
Effort to weaken the Endangered Species Act
questions.correctText: A federal judge recently struck down efforts to weaken the Endangered Species Act.

questions.q: A years-long project published in Nature revealed that approximately what percentage of social-science studies fail a replication test?
questions.correctText: Around half, or 49 percent, of previously published research results in the social and behavioral sciences could not be replicated in new experiments.

questions.q: What type of exercise has been found to actively slow down the biological aging process in the brains of older adults?
questions.correctText: Regular resistance training in older adults can actively slow down the biological aging process in their brains.

questions.q: According to new research, high-dose influenza vaccination is associated with a reduced risk of which neurological condition in adults aged 65 and older?
questions.correctText: High-dose influenza vaccination is associated with a reduced Alzheimer's dementia risk in adults aged 65 and older.
